name: Kaizen Discovery Inc.
summary: Kaizen Discovery Inc. explores for and develops mineral projects in Peru and Canada. It holds interest in the Pinaya Copper-Gold Project that covers an area of 100.65 square kilometers and includes 10 kilometers of underexplored strike length within the Andahuaylas-Yauri Porphyry-Skarn Belt in southeastern Peru. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. As of December 31, 2019, Kaizen Discovery Inc. operates as a subsidiary of HPX TechCo Inc.
